name: Blue Cornmeal Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (all-purpose flour and salt) with the blue corn meal.
2. Gradually add the wet ingredients (eggs and milk).
3. Let the batter stand for 30 minutes.
4. Heat a non-stick pan with 1 ounce of clarified butter.
5. Roll out the crepe on the hot pan until the edges turn brown, about 1-2 minutes.
6. Flip the crepe over and cook briefly (about 5 seconds) to set the surface.
7. Remove from the pan and fill with your favorite stuffing, such as salsa or crabmeat.
